scope: Official Chevrolet Suburban exterior-color evidence for United States model years 2000 through 2007. Complete palettes, supplemental mentions, package subsets, and SEO solid paints remain separate evidence classes.

source.title: 2000 Chevrolet Suburban Vehicle Information Kit
source.page_locator: PDF page 17, printed page 8, Exterior Paint / Paint Colors.
source.revision: Model-year kit; governing color section has no printed publication date.

The brochure prints no factory or WA codes; secondary aliases are not promoted into the availability matrix.

limitations: The source's lighter/darker two-tone footnote describes the interior, not exterior paint.
The retained official artifact ledger and crawler manifest contain no 2006 Chevrolet Suburban kit. No color is inferred from 2005 or 2007.
